title: Vietnamese-Style Indian Pork Curry
description: A fusion of Vietnamese and Indian flavors, this curry is a unique twist on traditional recipes. The spicy intensity of the dish balances the richness of the pork.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add ginger and garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add pork and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add coconut milk, fish sauce (if using), sugar, cumin, coriander, turmeric, salt, and pepper.
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to medium-low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the pork is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro (optional).
Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a complete meal.
